inputs.problem_text: From August 2018 - March 2019 there were 52% of cases of differences in incoming Granule 238 (BGZ) data between physical and SAP data. which results in the TECO production process being hampered and the waste in the planning process because it has to check the actual physical stock in the field every day.
inputs.goal_text: Decreasing percent of cases of differences in data on incoming Granule 238 (BGZ) between physical and SAP to 10% by November 2026
inputs.voc_list: Physical Stock with SAP is different

outputs.problem_statement: From August 2018 - March 2019, there were 52% of cases of differences in incoming Granule 238 (BGZ) data between physical and SAP data, resulting in the TECO production process being hampered and waste in the planning process due to daily checks of actual physical stock.
outputs.goal_statement: Decrease the percentage of cases of differences in data on incoming Granule 238 (BGZ) between physical and SAP to 10% by November 2026.
outputs.business_case: Improving data accuracy between physical stock and SAP will streamline the TECO production process, reduce waste in planning, and enhance overall supply chain efficiency, leading to cost savings and improved operational performance.

in_scope: Supply chain process from order receipt to delivery
out_of_scope: Supplier management outside of data accuracy impact

ctq_list.name: Data Accuracy Rate
ctq_list.description: The percentage of data entries for Granule 238 (BGZ) that match between physical stock and SAP records.

decision_trace.focus_ctq_strategy: Improve on-time delivery performance by identifying and addressing key factors affecting delivery timelines.
decision_trace.scope_boundary: The project will focus on the supply chain process from order receipt to delivery, including inventory management, logistics, and transportation.
risks: Potential resistance to process changes from supply chain partners
External factors such as weather or geopolitical events affecting delivery
decision_trace.notes_for_action: Engage with key stakeholders in the supply chain to gather insights on current delivery challenges. Conduct a data collection plan to ensure accurate measurement of on-time delivery rates. Consider external factors that may impact delivery and develop contingency plans.

define_state.summary_md:
## DEFINE — project_003
**Gate Status:** CONDITIONAL

### Problem
From August 2018 - March 2019, there were 52% of cases of differences in incoming Granule 238 (BGZ) data between physical and SAP data, resulting in the TECO production process being hampered and waste in the planning process due to daily checks of actual physical stock.

### Goal
Decrease the percentage of cases of differences in data on incoming Granule 238 (BGZ) between physical and SAP to 10% by November 2026.
